info.name: My Firts API Spring Boot
info.description:
# 📘 Documentación de la API - \[MFPSB\]

## 🧾 Descripción general

**Nombre del proyecto**: My fist project Spring Boot  
**Descripción**:  
**Tecnologías**: Java 21, Spring Boot, JPA, MySQL  
**Autor**: Paula Calvo Garcia  
**Fecha**: 10.06.2025

---

## 🚀 Cómo ejecutar el proyecto

``` bash
# Clonar el repositorio
git clone https://github.com/FemcodersPaulaCalvo/MFPSB.git
# Entrar en el proyecto
cd MFPSB
# Ejecutar con Maven
./mvnw spring-boot:run

 ```

item.name: PHRASE

request.description:
This is a GET request used to retrieve all the phrases from the MySQL database. There is no request body for a GET request.  
A successful GET response will have a `200 OK` status and must include some type of response body, for example, HTML web content or JSON data.  
Response: List of phrases with ID, name, author name, and category name.

``` json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Example",
    "author": "Sample text"
    "category": "Sample text"
  },
    {
    "id": 2,
    "name": "Example 2",
    "author": "Sample text 2"
    "category": "Sample text 2"
  }
]

 ```

This is a GET request by `ID` used to retrieve a phrase corresponding to that ID from the MySQL database. There is no request body for a GET request.  
A successful GET response will have a `200 OK` status and must include some type of response body, for example, HTML web content or JSON data.

  
Response: A phrase with an ID, name, author name, and category name.

``` json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Example",
    "author": "Sample text"
    "category": "Sample text"
  }

]

 ```

This is a POST request used to add a phrase to the MySQL database. The POST request does include a request body.  
A successful POST response will have a `200 OK` status and must include some type of response body, for example, HTML web content or JSON data.

Response: A phrase with an id, name, author name, and category name.

``` json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "name": "Example",
    "author": "Sample text"
    "category": "Sample text"
  }
﻿
]

 ```

This is a PUT request used to update a phrase in the MySQL database using an `ID`. The PUT request does include a request body.  
A successful PUT response will have a `200 OK` status and should include some type of response body, for example, HTML web content or JSON data.

Response: A phrase with an ID, name, author name, and category name.

``` json
{
        "text": "prueba11",
        "author": "Ralph Wiggum",
        "category": "Los Simpson"
    }

 ```

This is a DELETE request used to delete a phrase in the MySQL database using an `ID`. There is no request body in a DELETE request.  
A successful DELETE response will have a `200 OK` status and must include some type of response body, for example, HTML web content or JSON data.

  
Response: "Phrase has been deleted"

item.name: AUTHOR

request.description:
This is a POST request used to add an author to the MySQL database. The POST request does include a request body..

A successful POST request typically returns a `200 OK` or `201 Created` response code.

item.name: CATEGORY

request.description:
This is a POST request used to add a category to the MySQL database. The POST request does include a request body.

A successful POST request typically returns a `200 OK` or `201 Created` response code.
